extensionDescription.message: Intelligenter Sprachassistent für Übersetzung und Korrektur.

ocrDescription.message: Bereich auf dem Bildschirm auswählen, um Text zu kopieren.

inputPlaceholderPrompt.message: Beschreiben Sie, was generiert werden soll...

confirmClearHistory.message: Möchten Sie wirklich den gesamten Verlauf löschen?

ocrApiRequired.message: OCR erfordert einen eigenen API-Schlüssel (Gemini/OpenAI). In den Einstellungen konfigurieren.

errorNoApiKey.message: API key required. Add your OpenAI or Gemini key in Settings.

errorInputTooLong.message: Your text exceeds the 5000-character limit. Please shorten it.

errorChromeAiUnavailable.message: On-device AI is unavailable here. Update Chrome, or pick OpenAI/Gemini with your own key in Settings.

errorOcrRequiresKey.message: OCR needs your own API key (OpenAI or Gemini). Add one in Settings.

errorRateLimited.message: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

errorQuotaExceeded.message: API quota exceeded. Check your provider billing and limits.

errorNetwork.message: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

errorTimeout.message: Request timed out. Please try again with a shorter text.

errorContentTooLarge.message: Text is too long for the model. Please try a shorter text.

errorContentFiltered.message: The response was filtered for safety. Try rephrasing your text.

errorGeneric.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
